title: evolvulus helichrysoides
intro: Evolvulus helichrysoides, also known as dwarf morning glory, is a flowering plant species native to South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in traditional medicine for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Evolvulus helichrysoides include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems, among others. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various ailments.
